name: spiritlibraryapp
description: Spirit Library QR-coaster partnership outreach to hospitality leads. Sends from spiritlibraryapp@gmail.com. Hospitality-only category filter. Lightweight quality sort (real website + business email first). Auto-sends.

identity.persona_voice: Warm, hospitality-fluent. Pitch is a free gift (coasters) + a tool that helps their bartenders. Never pushy.

pitch_pack.body_template:
Your email was found by an agent — this one's typed and sent by one too.

I run Spirit Library — a free cocktail-recipe app with 1,700+ recipes, a My Bar filter, and the ability for bars to upload their own house menu so their cocktails show first.

Quick offer for {name}:

  • Free branded QR coasters (we print + ship) — guests scan, see your house menu inside Spirit Library plus 1,700 backup recipes
  • Free bartender training reference — new hires look up techniques + recipes by ingredient stock
  • Soft AI tools we can layer on later — reservations bot, 24/7 guest FAQ, automated review replies

No cost, no contract, no clawback. Two attached PNGs show the coaster design.

If this is interesting, reply with a shipping address and how many coasters fit your bar (most spots want 100–200).

— Steven
Spirit Library

Reply STOP to be removed from this list.

demo_gate.comment: SL pitch already includes shipped product (App Store link + spiritlibrary.app). No per-lead demo build.

opt_out.footer: Reply STOP to be removed from this list.

state.comment: SHARED with legacy send_spiritlibrary.py. Same file = one pacing envelope, no double-sends.
